assertions.title: Proactive refresh is visible before forwarding expired or near-expiry requests

steps.action: Start proxypilot-rs with an expired refreshable active account plus a local OAuth/upstream stub
steps.expected: Runtime stats start with expired auth health and zero counters
steps.observed: /v0/runtime/stats reported auth_health.state=expired with total_proxied_requests=0 and auth_refresh_attempts=0

steps.expected: Proxy refreshes before forwarding and the client request succeeds with the refreshed token
steps.observed: Client received 200 JSON showing received_authorization=Bearer preemptive-fresh-token

steps.action: Inspect runtime stats and stub traffic after the request
steps.expected: Stats show one refresh attempt/success and upstream sees only refreshed-token traffic
steps.observed: Stats showed total_proxied_requests=1, successful_upstream_responses=1, auth_refresh_attempts=1, upstream_401_count=0, last_refresh.kind=success; stub log recorded POST /oauth/token before GET /v1/models with Bearer preemptive-fresh-token

assertions.title: Upstream 401 retry refresh is visible and counted exactly once

steps.action: Start proxypilot-rs with a refreshable active account and a local stub that returns 401 on the first /v1/models request
steps.expected: Initial stats are zeroed and the first upstream attempt uses the stale token
steps.observed: Stub log recorded the first GET /v1/models with Bearer stale-401-token and response_status=401

steps.action: Let the proxy handle the 401-triggered refresh-and-retry path for one GET /v1/models client request
steps.expected: Proxy refreshes once, retries once, and the client sees the retried success result
steps.observed: Client received 200 JSON showing received_authorization=Bearer retry-fresh-token on attempt=2

steps.action: Inspect runtime stats and stub traffic after the request
steps.expected: Stats count one proxied request, one upstream 401, one refresh success, and mock upstream shows 401 then refresh then retry
steps.observed: Stats showed total_proxied_requests=1, successful_upstream_responses=1, auth_refresh_attempts=1, upstream_401_count=1, last_refresh.kind=success; stub log showed GET 401 -> POST /oauth/token -> GET 200 with Bearer retry-fresh-token

summary: Retested 2 assertions: VAL-HTTP-007 passed with proactive refresh before forwarding, and VAL-HTTP-008 passed with one 401-triggered refresh-and-retry path counted exactly once.
